message:
refactor(tests): apply clippy fixes to E2E and obligation proof integration tests

demo_e2e.rs:
  - Replace iterator .map(format!).collect::<String>() with .fold() +
    std::fmt::Write to avoid clippy::format_collect and reduce
    intermediate allocations when building hash input strings

obligation_proof_integration.rs:
  - Add explicit u32 type annotations to loop variables to avoid
    unnecessary as-casts throughout the test functions
  - Replace reg as u32 / i as u32 casts with direct typed variables
    since the loop counters are now already u32
  - Use u64::from() for lossless widening in assertions instead of
    n as u64 casts (clippy::cast_lossless)
  - Simplify match arm 0 | 1 | 2 to 0..=2 range pattern
    (clippy::match_same_arms)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
